hooks.prompt: Review the Remix/React Router code change for issues. Check for: 1) Fetching data in useEffect instead of using loader functions (bypasses Remix's data flow), 2) Using client-side state management (useState/Redux) for server data that should live in loaders, 3) Missing error boundary (ErrorBoundary export) in route modules, 4) Form submissions using fetch/axios instead of Remix <Form> or useSubmit (bypasses progressive enhancement), 5) Returning non-Response objects from actions/loaders (must return Response or use json/redirect helpers), 6) Missing revalidation handling after mutations (Remix auto-revalidates but custom fetchers may not), 7) Importing server-only modules (db, fs) in files that run on client (use .server.ts suffix), 8) Using window/document in loader/action functions (these run on server), 9) Missing TypeScript types for loader/action data (use LoaderFunctionArgs, ActionFunctionArgs), 10) Not handling the thrown Response from requireAuth in loaders (auth redirects must be caught). Return {"ok": true} if no issues, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"} if problems detected.
